  1. com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service

Package
Description
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.config
 
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller
 
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service
 
  • Classes in com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service used by com.daraxtlar.quantummail.config
    Class
    Description
    JwtService
    Service responsible for generating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
  • Classes in com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service used by com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller
    Class
    Description
    EmailAddressService
    Service responsible for managing user email account configurations.
    JwtService
    Service responsible for generating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
    MailService
    Service responsible for email synchronization, retrieval and mailbox management operations.
    SendEmailService
    Service responsible for composing and sending email messages through user-configured SMTP accounts.
    UserService
    Service responsible for user account management and authentication.
  • Classes in com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service used by com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service
    Class
    Description
    EmailCryptoService
    Service responsible for encrypting and decrypting email account passwords.
    JwtService
    Service responsible for generating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
    MailService
    Service responsible for email synchronization, retrieval and mailbox management operations.
    PasswordEncodeService
    Service responsible for password hashing and verification.
